'''Pa'hir'al City''' was a [[City/Legends|settlement]]<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Pa'hir'al system/Legends|Pa'hir'al system]], a part of [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes that [[Tirranna]] was captured in Pa'hir'al City "approximately two and a half [[Standard year/Legends|years]]" prior to its setting, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] operative [[Tirranna]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in Pa'hir'al City, which led to her interrogation by Imperial [[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pa'hir'al City was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
